title: Dara Hears the Farm
synopsis: Little Dara explores a colorful farm and discovers the special sounds each animal makes, from mooing cows to chirping chicks, in this gentle introduction to farm animal noises.

pages.text: Dara walks to the farm. What sounds will she hear?

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler girl with dark curly hair and warm brown skin wearing a bright yellow sundress walks along a dirt path toward a red barn. Rolling green hills with a white fence line the path. Soft morning light creates a warm, inviting atmosphere with pastel colors.

pages.text: The cow says MOO! Moo, moo, moo!

illustration.description: A large, friendly black and white spotted cow stands in a green pasture next to a smiling Dara. The cow has gentle eyes and is mid-moo with its mouth open. Pink and orange flowers dot the grass around them. The scene has soft watercolor textures.
illustration.alt: Dara listening to a mooing cow

pages.text: The pig says OINK! Oink, oink, oink!

illustration.description: A plump pink pig with a curly tail stands in a muddy pen, snorting happily. Dara leans on a wooden fence watching with delight. The pig has rosy cheeks and a friendly snout. Brown mud puddles and green grass create texture in warm earth tones.
illustration.alt: Dara watching a pig say oink

pages.text: The duck says QUACK! Quack, quack, quack!

illustration.description: A bright yellow duck with an orange beak paddles in a blue pond. Dara kneels by the water's edge, clapping her hands in joy. Water ripples around the duck, and cattails sway gently. The scene glows with soft blues and yellows.
illustration.alt: Dara listening to a duck quacking in a pond

pages.text: The sheep says BAA! Baa, baa, baa!

illustration.description: A fluffy white sheep with a black face stands in a green meadow dotted with wildflowers. Dara sits cross-legged nearby, giggling. The sheep has kind dark eyes and woolly texture. Purple and white flowers create a gentle border around the scene.
illustration.alt: Dara and a woolly sheep saying baa

pages.text: The horse says NEIGH! Neigh, neigh, neigh!

illustration.description: A beautiful brown horse with a flowing black mane tosses its head in a sunny paddock. Dara reaches up to gently pat the horse's neck. Golden sunlight filters through, creating warm highlights on the horse's coat and Dara's happy face.

pages.text: The chick says PEEP! Peep, peep, peep!

illustration.description: Three tiny yellow chicks with orange beaks chirp in a nest of golden straw. Dara crouches down low, watching with wonder. The chicks are fluffy and round with bright black dot eyes. Warm straw and soft shadows create a cozy barnyard corner.

pages.text: The rooster says COCK-A-DOODLE-DOO! What a loud sound!

illustration.description: A proud red rooster with a bright red comb and colorful tail feathers stands on a wooden fence post, crowing loudly. Dara covers her ears but smiles widely. Morning sunbeams streak across the farmyard in golden rays.
illustration.alt: Dara listening to a rooster crow

pages.text: Dara loves all the farm sounds. Moo, oink, quack, baa!

illustration.description: Dara stands in the center of the farmyard surrounded by all the animals - cow, pig, duck, sheep, horse, chicks, and rooster. Everyone looks happy together. The red barn and rolling hills frame the scene. Soft pastel colors create a warm, joyful group portrait.
illustration.alt: Dara surrounded by all the farm animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the cow make?
questions.explanation: The cow says MOO! Cows always say moo.

questions.question: Which animal says QUACK?
questions.explanation: The duck says QUACK! Ducks quack when they swim.

questions.question: What does Dara love?
questions.explanation: Dara loves all the farm sounds she hears from the animals.

pages.text: The cow says ___! Moo, moo, moo!
The ___ says QUACK! Quack, quack, quack!
